design_philosophy: A professional document management utility app for financial/business context. Prioritizes clarity, fast scanning of PDF lists, and obvious tap targets. High-contrast typography and structured layouts ensure trust and usability.

buttons.primary: Solid #0F172A background, white text, 12px border radius, h-48px.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid #E2E8F0 border, #0F172A text, 12px border radius, h-48px.
buttons.accent: Solid #2563EB background, white text, 12px border radius, h-48px. Used for main actions like Upload or Share.

inputs.style: h-48px, 12px border radius, 1px solid #E2E8F0, #F8FAFC background. Focus state: 1px solid #2563EB.

cards.style: #FFFFFF surface, 12px border radius, subtle md shadow. Used for Year List items and PDF items.

bottom_tabs.style: White background, top border #E2E8F0, active color #2563EB, inactive #64748B. Font size 11px.
bottom_tabs.icons: Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide (e.g. Calendar, Paperclip, FileText, Folder).

pdf_list_item.layout: Row flex, left: PDF Icon (with subtle blue background), middle: Title and Date, right: Share Button.

admin_upload_zone.layout: Dashed border #CBD5E1, background #F8FAFC, center-aligned upload icon and text. Minimalist and clear.

images.description: Modern building facade with reflective glass panels to be used as a subtle hero header image or background on the landing screen, heavily darkened or overlaid with #0F172A/80 for contrast.

icons.style: Stroke-based, consistent 1.5px to 2px width. Professional and unobtrusive.

logic_instructions.auto_categorization: Extract month/year and category from filename (e.g. 'Monthly return Feb'2026'). Map strictly to the 4 categories based on substring match. Unmatched go to 'OTHERS'.
logic_instructions.sharing: Use React Native `Share` API to share the PDF file URI. Provide a clean fallback if direct WhatsApp sharing fails.
logic_instructions.testing: All interactive elements must have testID props (e.g., testID='btn-client-access', testID='tab-monthly-return', testID='btn-share-pdf').
